title: The Desert March Continues
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on the desert march continues, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Desert March Continues. The crew reaches Yuba and sees what the drought and rebellion have done to the people who still believe in Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Good work, crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You must all be exhausted by now so why don't we all get some rest,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So we have enough energy for tomorrow!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Some talk comin' from someone who was sleeping until now!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ack!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's right! I passed out because I was freakin' exhausted! You got a problem with that?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry I'm not freakishly strong like you monsters!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh, so it's a fight you want, is that it...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I told you! I'm not good with the heat!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Umm, Samji, this is my bed...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh, I assumed you might need someone to comfort you while you sleep so I...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And what the hell do you think you're doing over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey! Who just threw that pillow! You've got some guts!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Some people are trying to get a little shut-eye here!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh that's it! You're all Ooonnin!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Yo old man! I still don't see any water! Ugh, my throat's soooo dry.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: I'm surprised you can manage to survive in a place like this.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The water will come...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The Yuba Oasis is still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yuba won't be defeated by the likes of sand...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll dig the oasis back up as many times as it takes...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Because this is the land the king himself specially entrusted to me...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Alright!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let's keep digging!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: HEY STOP! You're getting all the sand in my hole!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Are you TRYING to fill up my hole!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No, I'm trying to dig.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yes I know that but you're getting sand in my hole!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no point in digging if you're also going to fill up the very hole I dug already!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Oohhh... So your hole is some kinda magic hole, is that what you're saying?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Sn600@oreeel

summary: This part develops the desert march continues and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
